title: Nasir's Simple Skills
description: Adds a very simple skill point system into Minecraft!
body:
Adds very simple skills into minecraft. Complete achievements to gain skills and and assign them to make yourself stronger!

# Features
  **Skill Types**
- Health: Gain 1 Heart (2 HP) Per Skill Point Level (SPL)
- Armor: Gain 1 Armor Point Per SPL
- Attack Damage: Gain 0.5 Attack Damage Per SPL
- Movement Speed: Gain 10% More Speed Per SPL
- Efficiency: Gain 1 Innate Efficiency Level and 2% More Attack Speed Per SPL
- Jump Strength: Gain 10% More Jumping Strength Per SPL
- Feather Falling: Gain 1 Extra Block of Safe Falling Distance Per SPL
- Reach: Gain 0.3 Extra Blocks of Reach Per SPL
- Oxygen Bonus: Gain 1 Level of Respiration Per SPL

 **Obtaining Skill Points**
  
You can get skill points by doing some achievements and killing bosses. Note: You only get them for doing it the first time/getting the achievement for the first time.
Gain Skill Point Option in the skills menu. Consuming 30 Levels allows for the gaining of a skill point.

Example: Killing an elder guardian awards 3 Skill Points

Example 2: Killing a warden/wither/ender dragon awards 5 Skill Points

Example 3: Trading witih a villager awards 1 Skill Point

There is a max amount of 50 Skill Points obtainable without the gain skill point option in the menu. The first of which is granted to the player as soon as they join the game.
